docs.title: Index

docs.text: The Sun-Scorched A desert nomad who enters a frenzy in battle, fueled by the scorching heat of Amun-Ra. Solar Fortitude At level 3, you gains resistance to fire damage and can add your Constitution modifier to your saving throws against fire-based effects. Pyre Strike At level 6, you gains the ability to imbue your attacks with flames. Whenever you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can choose to deal an additional 1d6 fire damage. This damage increases by 1d6 at 9th level and every three levels thereafter. Solar Flare At level 10, you gains the ability to unleash a burst of solar energy while in a rage. This burst deals 3d6 radiant damage to all creatures within a 10-foot radius, and also blinds them for one rounds. You can use this ability a number of times equal to your level divided by three rounding down, and it becomes available again after a long rest. Inferno Form At level 14, you gains the ability to transform into a being of pure flames while in a rage. While in this form your attacks deal an additional 3d4 fire damage, and you can use your reaction to make a burn weapon attack against that creature with 2d4 of damage. The Scrab A very tough desert nomad capable of ignoring its injuries and keep on fighting. Scrab Carapace At level 3, you gains a natural armor bonus of +6 to your AC, as your skin hardens and thickens like a scrab's exoskeleton. You also gain resistance to piercing damage. Scrab Defense At level 6, using your rage and determination to withstand the impact, you gains the ability to shrug off an attack. You can use this ability as a reaction when you are hit by a creature, and take no damage from it. This ability can be used once per long rest. Scrab Endurance At level 10, you gains the ability to tap into your inner reserves of strength and endurance, gaining 30 extra hit points for one encounter of your choice, or two at level 17. You can use your ability to withstand more damage, to push yourself beyond your normal limits, or to turn the tide of a battle in your favor. However, if you end the encounter with 30 or fewer hit points, you will fall into a coma and become unconscious. This ability can be used once per long rest. Scrab Invulnerability At level 14, you becomes nearly invulnerable to melee and ranged, non-magical attacks, gaining resistance to all forms of such damage. In addition, you gain the ability to shrug off critical hits, treating them as normal hits instead. However, you are still vulnerable to magical attacks and other forms of damage.

docs.text: The Anubis' Curse A man that made a pack with Anubis, obtaining powerfull necromantic curses and spells. Anubis Rejection At level 1, you gain the ability of reviving a dead creature of CR 1/2 or lower to fight on your side for the duration of the encounter by touching it and asking Anubis (action). The maximum CR of the creature increase to 1 at level 3, 2 at level 6, 4 at level 14 and 8 at level 20. Anubis' Protection At level 3, you gain temporary hit points equal to your level plus your Charisma modifier when hit with a critical hit. Additionally, you can use your reaction to create a barrier of shadows, reducing the damage dealt by the next attack against you by an amount equal to your level + their Charisma modifier. Anubis' Judgement At level 14, you can cast the spell "Finger of Death". Additionally, you can use your action to call upon Anubis to resurrect a fallen ally within 30 ft, returning them to life with full hit points, allowing them to live for 3d20 days, can be done only once per day and ally. The Damned A man that made a shadowy pact with a unamed deity, gaing access to a set of horrible magical powers to the cost of his ethernal soul.
